text: SvdQrParitySuite added (4 tests, 29 parity total, all green): Svds.svd Largest top-k vs breeze svd (values 1e-7 elementwise, u/v sign-aware |dot|~1 at 1e-6, tall 30x12/40x15 + wide 12x30), Smallest bottom-k vs breeze tail (values exact at p via growth), blocked compact-WY QR at 120x110/200x120/110x128 (recon, QtQ=I, RtR=AtA), blocked least-squares vs backslash at 240x120/400x100. Passed first run — the codex blocked-QR and FMA work is cross-validated against Breeze.
